seoTitle: Englorie Park vs Enmore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Englorie Park vs Enmore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Englorie Park and Enmore.
heading: Englorie Park vs Enmore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Englorie Park, New South Wales and Enmore, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Enmore has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Englorie Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Englorie Park or Enmore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Englorie Park has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Enmore scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Englorie Park scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Enmore scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Englorie Park or Enmore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Enmore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
